data.title: 110 Million Claude AI Agents Can Now Discover and Procure TreeFree Diaper®
data.description: A company based in Vancouver, BC, GreenCore Solutions Corp. (GSC), shared an important update on April 15, 2026. They are focusing on serving the B2B procurement market by providing converters and grocery retail services. A notable achievement they disclosed today is the launch of TreeFree Diaper® SKUs, marking it as the pioneering consumer packaged goods (CPG) product to be fully integrated into agentic commerce. This move signifies a significant step in the industry and highlights the company's innovative approach.

data.title: Published Study Shows Laughter Yoga Improves Emotional and Physical Health Outcomes in Children
data.description: A recent systematic review involving 305 children has shown substantial decreases in stress, anxiety, and fatigue, endorsing laughter yoga as a secure and easily accessible Whole Health intervention. The findings of this study, published on April 15, 2026, underline the positive impact of laughter yoga on children's well-being.

data.title: Genesis Energy, L.P. Declares Quarterly Distribution
data.description: In Houston, Genesis Energy, L.P. (NYSE: GEL) has declared a quarterly cash distribution for the quarter ending March 31, 2026. The Board of Directors approved payments for common unit holders and Class A Convertible Preferred unit holders. Common unit holders will receive $0.18 per unit quarterly, totaling $0.72 annually. The distribution for preferred unit holders was also announced, but specific details were not provided.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp ManpowerGroup Expectations Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: ManpowerGroup Inc. (NYSE: MAN) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings before the market opens on April 16. Analysts predict earnings of 49 cents per share, marking an increase from the previous year's 44 cents per share. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be around $4.41 billion, compared to $4.09 billion last year. ManpowerGroup exceeded expectations with its fourth-quarter results announced on Jan. 29. The company's stock closed at $29.23, up 0.1% on Tuesday. For more detailed analyst ratings and information, readers can visit Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: Analogic & Leidos Security Enterprise Solutions Announce Intent to Combine Under Analogic Leadership
data.description: Analogic Corporation and Leidos, Inc. have officially agreed to merge, forming a new security imaging and detection entity. This merger will involve combining Analogic with Leidos' Security Enterprise Solutions, Ports & Borders, and Industrial Automation businesses. The transaction is projected to be finalized in the latter half of 2026, pending standard closing procedures and regulatory authorizations. Upon completion, the newly formed company will operate on a global scale.

data.title: Ransomware Activity Remains Elevated as New Threat Groups Reshape the Landscape, GuidePoint Security Finds
data.description: The latest report from GuidePoint Security, based in Reston, Virginia, reveals that ransomware activity continues to surge, highlighting a significant shift in threat actor behaviors.

data.title: As AI Accelerates Software Complexity, Thoughtworks Technology Radar Urges a Return to Engineering Fundamentals to Combat Cognitive Debt
data.description: On April 15, 2026, in Chicago, Thoughtworks, a worldwide technology consultancy known for combining design, engineering, and AI to promote digital advancement, unveiled the 34th edition of the Technology Radar. This report is a biannual publication that draws insights from the company's work with clients.

data.title: Triad Partners with CCBHC Transformation Workforce Career Accelerator to Expand Mental Health Workforce Nationwide
data.description: In South Jordan, Utah, on April 15, 2026, Triad, the business-to-business platform of Level Education Group, a prominent company offering education, community, and career services for behavioral health and nursing professionals, revealed a new collaboration. The partnership was established with the Certified Community Behavioral organization.

data.title: MEXC Publishes April 2026 Proof of Reserves, BTC Reserve Ratio Rises to 295%
data.description: In Victoria, Seychelles, on April 15, 2026, MEXC, a prominent player in zero-fee digital asset trading, released its Proof of Reserves for April 2026. The BTC reserve ratio surged to 295%, indicating a strong holding. All primary assets retained reserve ratios significantly surpassing the 1:1 industry benchmark, guaranteeing complete asset backing.

data.title: Leading Vision Insurance with Personalized Plans (2026): VSP Vision Care Highlighted for Flexible Coverage Choices by Consumer365
data.description: On April 15, 2026, in New York, a review conducted by Consumer365 ranked VSP® Individual Vision Plans as one of the top vision insurance providers in 2026 due to its emphasis on tailored plan structures and versatile choices. This acknowledgement is significant as consumers are increasingly seeking customizable insurance options in the ever-evolving market.

data.title: Future Nutra Innovation Summit Debuts as Natural Products' First Innovation-Only Conference
data.description: A nonprofit organization named the Future Nutra Foundation (FNF), which operates as a 501(c)(3) entity, is committed to promoting quality, transparency, education, and innovation within nutraceutical ingredients. The foundation recently unveiled plans for the first-ever Future Nutra Innovation Summit (FNIS) in Houston on April 15, 2026. This event aims to bring together industry professionals and experts to discuss advancements in the field.

data.title: Leading Businesses Join New Initiative To Respond to Extreme Weather Risks to Workers
data.description: According to a recent poll by the National Commission on Climate and Workforce Health, over 80% of American workers encountered a work-related disruption due to extreme weather in the last year. Surprisingly, only 4% of employers have conducted an assessment...

data.title: Leidos Security Enterprise Solutions and Analogic partner to form American joint venture and strengthen global security screening capabilities
data.description: A recent collaboration between Leidos (NYSE: LDOS) and Altaris, an investment firm, combines cutting-edge security detection systems and imaging technology to enhance security measures at airports, borders, and critical infrastructure globally. The joint venture, announced on April 15, 2026, aims to bolster security worldwide through this innovative partnership.

data.title: Millennial Shift Technologies and HSB Expand Collaboration with Launch of Non-Admitted Cyber on the mShift Platform
data.description: Today, Millennial Shift Technologies (mShift) revealed the introduction of HSB's Non-Admitted Cyber product on the mShift Platform in Phoenix on April 15, 2026. This expansion provides brokers with a wider cyber risk appetite and easier digital access to E&S coverage. The move aims to streamline processes and enhance efficiency for brokers.

data.title: Ceragon Highlights Select Private Network Contracts Totaling $10 Million in Recent Months
data.description: In a testament to the growing trend of private networks, a series of recent transactions involving utilities, mining, and public sector markets have highlighted the strength of this strategy. The transactions have further underlined the momentum in the sector, with Ceragon (NASDAQ: CRNT), a major player in delivering comprehensive wireless connectivity solutions, at the forefront. The developments in ROSH HA'AIN, Israel, on April 15, 2026, have showcased the company's commitment to capitalizing on the expanding opportunities.
